prerequisites: An API key (apikey) generated for that workspace by following the Timeplus 'Quickstart with Timeplus Ingestion API'.
The workspace endpoint URL (endpoint), for example https://us-west-2.timeplus.cloud/randomId123.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the workspace API key supplied in the required secret field 'apikey'. The key is created during Timeplus Ingestion API workspace setup and authorizes writes to the workspace at the configured 'endpoint'.

setupSteps.title: Create a Timeplus workspace and API key
setupSteps.body: Follow the Timeplus 'Quickstart with Timeplus Ingestion API' to create a workspace and generate an API key. Copy the API key to use as the connector's 'apikey' value.

setupSteps.title: Identify your workspace endpoint
setupSteps.body: Determine your workspace endpoint URL, formatted like https://us-west-2.timeplus.cloud/randomId123. This is the value for the required 'endpoint' field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: In the destination configuration, set 'endpoint' to your workspace endpoint URL and 'apikey' to the generated API key. Both fields are required.
